summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OttimizzazionePage (Risultati) redesign. All backend tests passed (7/7). All frontend features verified working correctly including 6 sections in correct order, KPI cards with trend badges, diagnosi automatica, prossima azione, trend block, and protocollo vendite checklist with toggle persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: OttimizzazionePage correctly implements all 6 sections in correct order: Stato → KPI → Diagnosi → Prossima Azione → Trend → Protocollo
Blocco Stato shows 'In attesa dei primi dati' when all KPI are 0 (correct behavior)
KPI grid shows 4 cards (Visite, Contatti, Vendite, Conversione) with correct formatting and 'stabile' trend badges when trend=0
TrendBadge component correctly shows 'stabile' with minus icon when trend is 0
Diagnosi Automatica shows 'Nessun dato ancora' when KPI are all 0 (correct behavior)
Prossima Azione shows 'Pubblica il primo contenuto' when KPI are 0 (correct behavior)
Trend block shows 'Stabile' with description when trends are 0 (correct behavior)
Protocollo Vendite checklist renders 4 items with toggle functionality working
Backend GET /api/partner-journey/ottimizzazione/{partner_id} returns correct KPI data structure
Admin badge 'Vista Admin' correctly hidden when isAdmin=false (viewing as partner)
All data-testid attributes present and working: blocco-stato, kpi-dashboard, kpi-card-*, diagnosi-automatica, prossima-azione, trend-block, protocollo-vendite, protocol-*
test_credentials: Admin: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74, Partner ID: 2 (Arianna Aceto)
context_for_next_testing_agent: OttimizzazionePage (Risultati) fully tested. Navigation: Login as admin → Click 'Vista Partner' tab → Click 'Risultati' in sidebar. Page features: 1) Blocco Stato 'Come sta andando' with status indicator, 2) KPI grid with 4 cards (Visite/Contatti/Vendite/Conversione) + trend badges, 3) Diagnosi Automatica section, 4) Prossima Azione dark block with CTA, 5) Trend block showing overall trend, 6) Protocollo Vendite checklist with 4 toggleable items. Backend endpoints tested: GET /api/partner-journey/ottimizzazione/{partner_id} and POST /api/partner-journey/ottimizzazione/salva-protocollo. Current data has all KPI at 0, so page shows initial state messages.
